visualizations.title: Decimal Expansion Structure
visualizations.description: Mathematical layout of a decimal number broken down by place values.

steps.explanation: Whole Number Part: Hundreds (300), Tens (40), and Ones (5).
Tenths: Six parts of a tenth (0.6).
Hundredths: Seven parts of a hundredth (0.07).
Thousandths: Eight parts of a thousandth (0.008).

visualizations.title: Place Value Chart of 42.375
visualizations.description: Watch each digit of 42.375 highlight to reveal its specific place value and fractional size.
